title: Cheesy Chinese Pilaf
description: A classic Chinese-inspired pilaf with the added richness of cheese. This dish is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Cook the pilaf according to the package instructions.
In a bowl, mix the cottage cheese with a pinch of salt.
Add the cooked pilaf to the bowl and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Place the sliced flatbread on top of the mixture.
Bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
